# EntryLab — Forex News & Trading Intelligence
> EntryLab is an independent trading intelligence platform covering forex brokers, proprietary trading firms, and XAU/USD signals. We publish expert reviews, news, and comparative analysis for retail and professional traders worldwide.

## What EntryLab Covers

EntryLab publishes three core content types:

- **Broker Reviews**: In-depth, independently researched reviews of regulated and offshore forex brokers. Covering spreads, regulation, minimum deposit, leverage, platforms (MT4, MT5, cTrader, TradingView, TradeLocker), and withdrawal reliability.
- **Prop Firm Reviews**: Evaluation-based funded trader programmes. Covering profit splits, max drawdown rules, evaluation fees, payout speed, and platform access.
- **Trading News & Analysis**: Regulatory updates, broker closure alerts, platform launches, and market tools for traders.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://entrylab.io/
- Broker Directory (17 reviewed brokers): https://entrylab.io/brokers
- Prop Firm Directory (14 reviewed firms): https://entrylab.io/prop-firms
- Broker Comparison Tool: https://entrylab.io/compare
- Premium Signals: https://entrylab.io/signals

## Content Categories

- Broker News: https://entrylab.io/broker-news
- Prop Firm News: https://entrylab.io/prop-firm-news
- Broker Guides: https://entrylab.io/broker-guides
- Prop Firm Guides: https://entrylab.io/prop-firm-guides
- Trading Tools: https://entrylab.io/trading-tools
- General News: https://entrylab.io/news

## Broker Reviews (17 brokers)

Each broker review page at https://entrylab.io/broker/{slug} includes: rating, regulation, minimum deposit, leverage, spreads, platforms, deposit methods, pros/cons, and a structured FAQ. Reviewed brokers include:

- IC Markets (ASIC, CySEC, FSA | Raw ECN | from $200) — https://entrylab.io/broker/ic-markets
- Pepperstone (FCA, ASIC, CySEC | Raw + cTrader | from $0) — https://entrylab.io/broker/pepperstone
- FP Markets (ASIC, CySEC | Raw + IRESS DMA | from $100) — https://entrylab.io/broker/fp-markets
- AvaTrade (6 regulators | AvaProtect | from $100) — https://entrylab.io/broker/avatrade
- CMC Markets (FCA, ASIC | Next Generation platform | from $0) — https://entrylab.io/broker/cmc-markets
- XM (CySEC, ASIC, DFSA | from $5 | up to 1:1000) — https://entrylab.io/broker/xm
- IG (FCA, ASIC, CFTC | 17,000+ markets | from $0) — https://entrylab.io/broker/ig-group
- Saxo Bank (FSA, FCA, ASIC | SaxoTraderGO | 72,000+ instruments) — https://entrylab.io/broker/saxo-bank
- Eightcap (ASIC, FCA, CySEC | TradingView | from $100) — https://entrylab.io/broker/eightcap
- OctaFX (CySEC | Copy Trading | from $25) — https://entrylab.io/broker/octafx
- Moneta Markets (FCA | from $50 | up to 1:1000) — https://entrylab.io/broker/moneta-markets
- TMGM (ASIC, FMA | from $100) — https://entrylab.io/broker/tmgm
- Trade Nation (FCA, ASIC | Fixed Spreads | from $0) — https://entrylab.io/broker/trade-nation
- Tradu (FCA, ASIC, CySEC, CIRO | from $50) — https://entrylab.io/broker/tradu
- HeroFX (Offshore | TradeLocker | from $5) — https://entrylab.io/broker/herofx-review
- GatesFX (Offshore | MT5 + TradeLocker | from $10) — https://entrylab.io/broker/gatesfx-review
- Liquid Brokers (ASIC | from $10) — https://entrylab.io/broker/liquidbrokers-review

## Prop Firm Reviews (14 firms)

Each prop firm review at https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/{slug} includes: profit split, max funding, evaluation fee, drawdown rules, payout speed, and trading rules. Reviewed firms include:

- FTMO (80-90% split | up to $200K | from $155) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/ftmo
- FundedNext (80-95% split | up to $200K | from $32) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/fundednext
- Fintokei (80-95% split | up to €400K | from €99) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/fintokei
- Funding Pips (80-95% split | up to $2M | instant payouts) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/funding-pips
- E8 Markets (80-100% split | up to $1M | from $33) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/e8-markets
- The5ers (50-100% split | up to $4M scaling | from $39) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/the5ers
- FunderPro (daily rewards | flexible evaluation) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/funderpro
- TX3 Funding (formerly TopTier Trader | FX & Futures) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/tx3-funding
- Lux Trading Firm (real-money funded | live capital) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/lux-trading-firm
- Smart Trader Funds (unlimited time evaluation) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/smart-trader-funds
- Goat Funded Trader (instant funding options) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/goat-funded-trader
- RebelsFunding (independent verification) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/rebelsfunding
- Crypto Fund Trader (crypto-focused prop firm) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/crypto-fund-trader
- Wall Street Funded (structured evaluation) — https://entrylab.io/prop-firm/wall-street-funded

## Editorial Standards

EntryLab reviews are produced by an independent editorial team. Ratings are assigned on a 1-5 scale based on: regulatory compliance, trading conditions, platform quality, customer support, and withdrawal reliability. Affiliate links may be present on broker pages; this does not influence our ratings or editorial conclusions. All data is verified against official broker/firm disclosures and current as of the review date.

## Machine-Readable Data

- Sitemap: https://entrylab.io/sitemap.xml
- Structured data: JSON-LD on all pages (Organization, Article, Review, BreadcrumbList, FAQPage, FinancialService, ItemList schemas)
